Metadata.title: BG3 Checklist
Metadata.description: A personal Baldur's Gate 3 Act 1, Act 2, and Act 3 playthrough tracker.

Checklist.noMatchingEntries: No checklist entries match the current filters.
Checklist.footer: Checklist content extracted from <source>Gamestegy's Act {act} checklist</source>. Progress stays in this browser.

ClearProgress.title: Clear Act {act} progress?
ClearProgress.description: This removes completed items, collapsed sections, and the hide-completed preference for this act from this browser.

Details.noAdditionalNotes: No additional notes for this checklist item.

Map.title: Interactive map
Map.description: Click any location marker to update
Map.openInNewTab: Open current map in a new tab
